name: nebskill
description: Nudged Elastic Band reaction-barrier calculations on organic molecules using the Transition1x dataset, powered by native ORCA (Opt / NEB-CI / NEB-TS / OptTS / Freq / IRC / GOAT at wB97X/6-31G(d)). Requires uv; Python dependencies install automatically. Cluster jobs run via a companion HPC agent plugin (Rikyu/Hokusai).

interface.shortDescription: Find reaction barriers and minimum energy paths with ORCA NEB-CI/NEB-TS.
interface.longDescription: Run Nudged Elastic Band calculations on organic molecules from the Transition1x dataset. Sources reaction geometries from a bundled cache, relaxes endpoints with ORCA Opt, finds the minimum energy path and barrier with NEB-CI or NEB-TS, optionally refines the transition state with OptTS + IRC + GOAT, and compares against published DFT references. Heavy steps dispatch to an HPC cluster via a companion Hokusai or Rikyu agent plugin.
defaultPrompt: Run the NEB demo to check my machine is set up.
Find the reaction barrier for reaction 42.
Run a reproduction study on my sampled reaction set.
